name: Tainted of the Tistina
name_jp: ティスティナの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>瘴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute Summon this card face-up by Tributing 1 face-down monster your opponent controls. This card's Level becomes 10 if it was Normal Summoned/Set. If this card is sent to the GY, except from the field: You can target 1 "Tistina" monster you control; this turn, it can make a second attack during each Battle Phase, also you can only attack with 1 monster.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute Summon this card face-up by Tributing 1 face-down monster your opponent controls. This card's Level becomes 10 if it was Normal Summoned/Set. If this card is sent to the GY, except from the field: You can target 1 "Tistina" monster you control; this turn, it can make a second attack during each Battle Phase, also you can only attack with 1 monster.
eff: You can Tribute Summon this card face-up by Tributing 1 face-down monster your opponent controls. This card's Level becomes 10 if it was Normal Summoned/Set. If this card is sent to the GY, except from the field: You can target 1 "Tistina" monster you control; this turn, it can make a second attack during each Battle Phase, also you can only attack with 1 monster.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
